tools.name: validate_skill
tools.description: Fully validate a Claude SKILL.md file — frontmatter rules, body quality, security scan, tool collision check. Returns score (0–100), gate (pass/review/fail), and structured errors/warnings.

tools.name: lint_frontmatter
tools.description: Parse and validate only the YAML frontmatter of a Claude Skill. Returns parsed fields and any rule violations. Use during iterative authoring.

tools.name: scan_security
tools.description: Scan a Claude Skill for dangerous shell commands, hardcoded secrets, or prompt-injection phrases. Returns findings with excerpts.

tools.name: score_skill
tools.description: Run full validation and return a 0–100 score plus a ship gate (pass/review/fail). Minimal payload suitable for CI/CD pipelines.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "scan_security" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Scan a Claude Skill for dangerous shell commands, hardcoded secrets, or prompt-injection phrases. Returns findings with excerpts.
